name: Sample Education Data
description: Synthetic dataflow for plugin testing. CSV source, two output entities, includes a NestedJoin and a conditional column for risk-pattern coverage. No real workspace credentials embedded.

pbi:mashup.document:
section Section1;
shared Schools = let
  Source = AzureStorage.Blobs("https://samplestorage.blob.core.windows.net/"),
  Navigation = Source{[Name = "sample"]}[Data],
  #"Filtered rows" = Table.SelectRows(Navigation, each [Extension] = ".csv" and [Name] = "Education/schools_sample.csv"),
  #"Navigation 1" = #"Filtered rows"{[#"Folder Path" = "https://samplestorage.blob.core.windows.net/sample/", Name = "Education/schools_sample.csv"]}[Content],
  #"Imported CSV" = Csv.Document(#"Navigation 1", [Delimiter = ",", Columns = 5, Encoding = 65001, QuoteStyle = QuoteStyle.None]),
  #"Promoted headers" = Table.PromoteHeaders(#"Imported CSV", [PromoteAllScalars = true]),
  #"Renamed columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Promoted headers", {{"URN", "School ID"}, {"SCHNAME", "School Name"}}),
  #"Changed column type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Renamed columns", {{"School ID", Int64.Type}, {"School Name", type text}}),
  #"Merged queries" = Table.NestedJoin(#"Changed column type", {"School ID"}, #"Ofsted Rating", {"URN"}, "Ofsted Rating", JoinKind.LeftOuter),
  #"Expanded Ofsted Rating" = Table.ExpandTableColumn(#"Merged queries", "Ofsted Rating", {"Rating"}, {"Ofsted Rating"}),
  #"Added custom" = Table.AddColumn(#"Expanded Ofsted Rating", "Ofsted Rank", each if [Ofsted Rating] = "Outstanding" then 1 else if [Ofsted Rating] = "Good" then 2 else if [Ofsted Rating] = "Requires improvement" then 3 else null)
in
  #"Added custom";
shared #"Ofsted Rating" = let
  Source = AzureStorage.Blobs("https://samplestorage.blob.core.windows.net/"),
  Navigation = Source{[Name = "sample"]}[Data],
  #"Filtered rows" = Table.SelectRows(Navigation, each [Extension] = ".csv" and [Name] = "Education/ofsted_sample.csv"),
  #"Navigation 1" = #"Filtered rows"{[#"Folder Path" = "https://samplestorage.blob.core.windows.net/sample/", Name = "Education/ofsted_sample.csv"]}[Content],
  #"Imported CSV" = Csv.Document(#"Navigation 1", [Delimiter = ",", Columns = 2, Encoding = 65001, QuoteStyle = QuoteStyle.None]),
  #"Promoted headers" = Table.PromoteHeaders(#"Imported CSV", [PromoteAllScalars = true])
in
  #"Promoted headers";
